post.subject: Its all go!
post.body: "Hell yes!!!" "Dude this will be fucking great!" "Now look, you got me all excited." Those were the words of James. As of today, I am going to America this summer!

comments.body:
YAY

Congrats for making the right decision, hope you have a great time.
But tell me more about it as you find out ok
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
